description: ResourceReadinessService was design-only and not physically implemented.
repair_done: Added ResourceReadinessService with operator/machine/material/tool/NC/IPQC gates and tests.
acceptance_gate: ReleaseWorkOrder/StartJob command handlers call service and persist snapshot/event/audit/outbox in PG.

description: Readiness snapshot had no authoritative physical target.
repair_done: Added resource_readiness_snapshot with hash, idempotency, blocker, gate result, quality hold refs.
acceptance_gate: Live command writes exactly one snapshot per command/idempotency key.

description: MES runtime event spine for readiness/containment was not physical.
evidence: Existing 098 ledger is broad; P14 gap required runtime event spine.
repair_done: Added mes_runtime_event_spine with event hash and idempotency constraints.
acceptance_gate: Runtime events append through one canonical append path with telemetry and replay proof.

description: MES material issue/start gates did not consume canonical P33 quality holds.
evidence: P33 handoff required P34 to consume quality_holds.
repair_done: P34 material hold gate calls CanonicalQualityCaseAuthorityService and blocks held lots.
acceptance_gate: Inventory and WO handlers fail closed on quality_holds before issue/putaway/start/complete.

description: WO start could run with wrong NC checksum.
evidence: DOMAIN_COMMAND_SPEC ReleaseWorkOrder requires released NC program; P30 checksum existed separately.
repair_done: P34 checks expected/controller SHA-256 and blocks mismatch.
acceptance_gate: NC download receipt and controller checksum are read from governed live repository before start.

description: Tool/gage readiness is only evidence-array based in P34.
repair_done: P34 blocks supplied broken/expired/exhausted tool/gage evidence.
acceptance_gate: Tool life, breakage containment, gage calibration and MSA gates read physical authority tables.

description: PHPUnit test command cannot run because vendor/bin/phpunit is missing.
repair_done: Ran php lint and direct PHP smokes for all required scenarios.
acceptance_gate: Install/restore vendor dependencies and run PHPUnit suite in CI/VPS.
PostgreSQL configured/reachable with restore drill and zero P0/P1 blocker drift.
